name: Fake elixir of immortality | You got turned into a woman and captured by an Orc
description:
As soon as you heard the news of an elixir of immortality being found in caves southwest from here, you were the first one to get there. What you didn't know however, is that there was an additional effect to it, and that it belonged to a certain someone...

____________________________________________________________________________

Wohoo, i'm finally releasing another bot, y'all happy right ? Please tell me you are.

Requested by @MarukoNeA8 with my own touch to it.

You can get a wholesome ending in this one, i went with the settings of you getting mindbroken after being fucked senseless and becoming his loving wife. He can be surpisingly caring for an Orc (no idea, i didn't test that part but it should be the case).

I have some other ideas of some weird gender bender bot that might or might not come out soon, you've probably seen how inconsistent i am.

I didn't have any idea for exemple dialogues so please give me some feedback, if the bot sucks or forget to add submission and womb status i'll add some.

Sauce for the image is 461739.
